name: resume-assistant-root
description: Monorepo for Eden Cadagiani's resume assistant.
author: Eden Cadagiani <e.cadagiani@gmail.com>

scripts.dev_api_restart: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs api -f
scripts.dev_api_reset: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down -v && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs api -f
scripts.dev_api_reset_volumes: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down && docker volume rm $(docker volume ls -q | grep db_data) && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs api -f
scripts.dev_populate_db: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec api npm run script:populate-db
scripts.preprod_start: docker compose -f docker-compose.preprod.yml down && docker compose -f docker-compose.preprod.yml build && docker compose -f docker-compose.preprod.yml up -d && docker compose -f docker-compose.preprod.yml logs api -f
scripts.preprod_ecr_start: docker compose -f docker-compose.preprod_ecr.yml down && docker compose -f docker-compose.preprod_ecr.yml pull api && docker compose -f docker-compose.preprod_ecr.yml up -d --no-deps --force-recreate && docker compose -f docker-compose.preprod_ecr.yml logs api -f
